This is Ichiraku ramen, the best ramen house in the world!
You can eat ramen here anytime (its free and will pass
the time) or you can purchase ramen to heal yourself in
You also can work here at night for a payment.
But first you have to get hired, so speak with the
Hinata works here too, so think twice about rejecting the job!
Also: there are other characters that come to eat at
Ichiraku on various days, you might meet them while working.
Now go talk to Teuchi and get your broke ass a job!
